texto: Because it is such a powerful force in the world today, the Western Judeo-Christian tradition is often accepted as the arbiter of 'natural' behavior of humans. If Europeans and their descendant nations of North America accept something as normal, then anything different is seen as abnormal. Such a view ignores the great diversity of human experience.
explicacao: Citação de Walter L. Williams sobre temas ligados a tempo. “Because it is such a powerful force in the world today, the Western Judeo-Christian tradition is …” articula tempo, diversity, sexuality em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como termino e sexuality.
